blocked_until: or explicit lead priority override for custom character production

goal: Replace the temporary KayKit/Ozz miner with an original Mine Cards voxel/low-poly miner while preserving the accepted reusable skeletal animation path.

selected_production_lane.reason: Precise pivots, public-safe silhouette ownership, stable Y-up model contract, and predictable socket/skinning compatibility matter more than raw generation speed for the first custom miner.
allowed_support: generated raster concepts as reference only
Blockbench cuboid modeling and texture painting

silhouette: helmet lamp or hair/beard shape unique to Mine Cards
palette: copper accent lane for upgrade read
public_safety_distance: no Minecraft texture cadence or palette
old PSD hero may inform mining fantasy only, not silhouette copying

rigid_socketed: helmet lamp if authored as separate mesh
body_and_gear_policy.rule: Do not show decorative gear that implies a mechanic unless it maps to an actual or planned progression slot.

model_contract.stage_fit: must fit current T0001 fixed top action stage without covering HUD/progress/reward UI

texture_policy.preferred: small texture set or vertex colors with broad readable material areas

skeleton_contract.preferred: compatible with the existing reusable Ozz/skinned path
skeleton_contract.animation_source: reuse current Pickaxing clip only if retarget remains clean

first_candidate_acceptance: license or ownership note is explicit
source axes, scale, origin, and export matrix are recorded
native proof shows idle/mining motion with attached pickaxe
CPU skinning remains within the established one-actor budget or records measured remediation
screenshot review confirms the miner no longer reads as placeholder/debug art
